reviews.review_description:
The interface is clean, but I wanted the digestive system, so I created an account.  When I try to sign in, it just hangs with the only indication being that the button changed.  Did it log me in? Did it fail?  This makes this app unusable for me.

UPDATE: You wait 8 months to respond and then want me to email you for more "immediate" help?  I deleted and moved on long ago.

developer_response.body: We understand your experience and apologize for any inconvenience caused by the delay in our response. We want to assure you that we are actively working on improving our response times and overall service quality to ensure a better experience for all our users. If there's anything we can do to regain your trust or assist you further, please don't hesitate to reach out.

reviews.review_description: I really wanted to love this, but I couldn't use it without setting up  a PayPal account. Then, I had to set up my Ebers account. Then I had to sign in. It said "loading" and that it all that happened. After several minutes I quit the program and tried again. Same thing. Tried a 3rd and 4th time. Same thing. All it said was loading. An hour and a half later, I cancelled "future" payments. But they still got $30 Canadian. Rip off. Don't waste your time. Never got to use the program at all.

developer_response.body: Hi Lgillen66, We apologize for the frustration you encountered with our app. Your feedback is invaluable, and we're actively addressing the issues you've raised for a smoother experience. We'll also investigate the payment matter immediately. Can you please send an email to info@ebers.uk in order to help you ASAP. Sincere apologies again.

reviews.review_title: A Fascinating Journey into the Human Bod
reviews.review_description: It's like stepping into a science class, but way cooler. I mean, you're literally inside the human body! And let me tell you, it's mind-blowing.

developer_response.body: Hi Omar, Thank you for your enthusiastic feedback on the Ebers Anatomy VR app. Your description of it as a "fascinating journey into the human body" is deeply appreciated. We're thrilled that you found the experience both educational and immersive. Your feedback inspires us to continue delivering engaging experiences.

reviews.review_description: Premium costs $20 per month and is necessary for all but the basics (otherwise skeletal only at time of writing). Website was a bit clunky, wasn't obvious how to sign up for premium, the button on the home page ceased to work once you make an account then you have to sign up for premium in "my account". Not how I'd have done it. Experience in the application was okay, keyboard is funky for log in, but hovering control panel is slick. Disappointed by vascular system which was lacking a lot of detail, most notably in the groin. Visual of dermis was interesting but didn't seem to be interactive. All in all I don't think it is likely to be better value than a certain long standing competitor that prices upfront.

developer_response.body:
Hi Victor, Thank you for taking the time to share your thoughts on the Ebers Anatomy VR app. We apologize for any confusion with the premium subscription process and website functionality. Your input on the user experience is valuable, and we'll work on making improvements.
While we're pleased you found some aspects enjoyable, we're taking note of your concerns regarding the vascular system and dermis visual for future updates. 
Your feedback guides our improvements, and we're grateful for your support. And please feel free to email us at info@ebers.uk

reviews.review_description: Like a lot of anatomy experiences, the reproductive system is behind a paywall.

developer_response.body:
Hi byteframe. Thanks for reaching out. Your feedback means a lot to us. We've been listening to users like you, and we've made some exciting changes to the Ebers Anatomy VR app based on your input. We've introduced a cool "try before you buy" feature, giving you 30 minutes to explore and see if you like the Ebers Anatomy VR app before to purchase it. And with just one payment, you can unlock the premium version for unlimited use. You can send your comments as well to info@ebers.uk. We are more than happy to assist you.

The Ebers team.
